title: Judge orders Trump to pay E. Jean Carroll $5.8 million
shortDescription: A federal judge ordered Trump to pay E. Jean Carroll $5.8 million after a New York jury found him liable for sexual abuse.

title: Trump confuses 'Islamic Republic of Japan' for Iran in NATO remarks
shortDescription: President Donald Trump mistakenly said the "Islamic Republic of Japan" fired 111 missiles at a U.S. aircraft carrier.

title: Here's what's happening at Trump-backed Freedom Fuel gas stations
shortDescription: The White House promoted "Freedom Fuel" stations with $3.47 gas in the Philadelphia region. Customers said they just want cheap gas.

title: Confederate statue reinstalled in DC after Trump executive order
shortDescription: A Confederate general statue that was torn down during Black Lives Matter protests has been reinstalled in D.C.’s Judiciary Square.

title: Trump appears to confuse Iran, Japan
shortDescription: Trump mistakenly calls Iran the 'Islamic Republic of Japan' at NATO summit in Ankara, Turkey.

title: Trump's name to remain off Kennedy Center while he appeals removal
shortDescription: Trump's name will remain off the Kennedy Center while he appeals its removal, a panel of judges ruled.

title: Trump says he's targeted by Iran: 'I'm number one on the kill list'
shortDescription: The president also appeared to threaten Iran's new regime, suggesting they could suffer the same fate as previous leaders.

title: Could a 'Grey's Anatomy' star save Democrats in Maine Senate race?
shortDescription: Patrick Dempsey, Maine native and 'Grey's Anatomy' star, is generating buzz as Democrats seek a Senate candidate replacement.

title: Trump responds to Iran target claims at NATO
shortDescription: President Donald Trump addressed concerns about being Iran's top target and ongoing threats during remarks at the NATO summit in Turkey.

title: What a viral July 4 photograph says about the First Amendment
shortDescription: The woman's brother said the photo was "basically like hounds surrounding her." One expert said the First Amendment protected everyone involved.

title: Judge orders Trump's $5.8 million to be paid to E. Jean Carroll
shortDescription: A federal judge ordered that E. Jean Carroll receive $5.8 million she won in her case against Donald Trump. He is continuing to appeal the case.

title: Trump says Iran ceasefire is 'over.' What's the status of peace talks?
shortDescription: A preliminary peace deal between the U.S. and Iran is in jeopardy after hostilities flared up again and Trump said he considered the ceasefire “over.”

title: Trump criticizes NATO allies in Turkey
shortDescription: President Donald Trump criticized NATO allies in Ankara, Turkey, for the lack of support in the U.S. war with Iran and Greenland annexation.

title: 'Wasted cause': Trump orders halt to trade with Spain
shortDescription: President Trump ordered his administration cut off trade with Spain as he accused the NATO ally of not contributing enough to the alliance's defense.

title: Trump can't subpoena poll worker information in Georgia, judge rules
shortDescription: A federal judge ruled a Trump subpoena of poll worker information in Georgia is "unreasonable and must be quashed" in 2020 election conspiracy.

title: At Texas Capitol, foreign surrogacy debate puts IVF access on edge
shortDescription: Texas’s foreign surrogacy hearing links birthright citizenship to fertility care, worrying IVF advocates that broader limits may follow.

title: Trump sends new Air Force One to England to honor military with tours
shortDescription: Trump sent the Qatari-gifted 747 that serves as Air Force One to England, so members of the military could tour it.

title: Mamdani calls on Graham Platner to end Maine Senate campaign
shortDescription: Zohran Mamdani called on Platner to end his campaign Tuesday. Here's what to know.

title: Mamdani calls on Graham Platner to end Maine Senate campaign
shortDescription: Zohran Mamdani called on Platner to end his campaign Tuesday. Here's what to know.

title: Trump says Iran ceasefire is 'over'
shortDescription: President Donald Trump said after the latest round of strikes between the U.S. and Iran, he considers the ceasefire to be over.

title: Trump says ceasefire with Iran is over
shortDescription: Trump made remarks at NATO summit in Turkey and more news to start your Wednesday.

title: Iran updates: US conducts strikes as Trump says ceasefire is 'over'
shortDescription: Trump said after the latest round of tit-for-tat strikes between the U.S. and Iran that he considers the ceasefire between the two nations to be over.

title: White House calls birthright citizenship irony in Balogun case 'asinine'
shortDescription: The White House pushed back against questions of irony that Trump advocated for USMNT striker Folarin Balogun, a birthright citizen.

title: White House launches 25 Freedom Fuel gas stations in this region
shortDescription: The White House launched gas stations, it announced on July 7, but the prices aren't much lower than the national average. See where they're located.
